member.name: T:Better11.Services.Analytics.AnalyticsService
member.summary: Implements basic analytics and telemetry logging for Better11. Respects the user's telemetry opt-out setting; when disabled, no events are logged or sent.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.Analytics.AnalyticsService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Better11.Services.Analytics.AnalyticsService},Better11.Core.Interfaces.ISettingsService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The settings service to read telemetry opt-in.

member.name: P:Better11.Services.Analytics.AnalyticsService.IsTelemetryEnabled
member.summary: Returns true if telemetry is enabled (user opt-in).

member.name: M:Better11.Services.Analytics.AnalyticsService.TrackEventAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Tracks an analytics event with optional properties.
member.param: The name of the event to track.
Optional key-value pairs describing the event.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.Analytics.AnalyticsService.TrackExceptionAsync(System.Exception,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Tracks an exception with optional properties.
member.param: Optional key-value pairs describing the context.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.Analytics.AnalyticsService.TrackPageViewAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Tracks a page view.
member.param: The name of the page being viewed.

member.name: T:Better11.Services.AppUpdate.AppUpdateService
member.summary: Checks for, downloads, and installs application updates using a version manifest.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.AppUpdate.AppUpdateService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Better11.Services.AppUpdate.AppUpdateService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Better11.Services.BackupRestore.BackupRestoreService
member.summary: Service for managing system restore points and registry/file backups via PowerShell.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.BackupRestore.BackupRestoreService.#ctor(Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPowerShellService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Better11.Services.DiskCleanup.DiskCleanupService
member.summary: Provides disk cleanup operations via the B11.DiskCleanup PowerShell module. Implements with thread-safe clean operations.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.DiskCleanup.DiskCleanupService.#ctor(Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPowerShellService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Better11.Services.DiskCleanup.DiskCleanupService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The PowerShell service used to invoke commands.

member.name: T:Better11.Services.Driver.DriverService
member.summary: Provides driver management operations via the B11.Drivers PowerShell module. Implements with thread-safe update, backup, and rollback operations.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.Driver.DriverService.#ctor(Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPowerShellService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Better11.Services.Driver.DriverService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The PowerShell service used to invoke commands.

member.name: T:Better11.Services.Network.NetworkService
member.summary: Provides network management operations via the B11.Network PowerShell module. Implements with thread-safe DNS and cache operations.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.Network.NetworkService.#ctor(Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPowerShellService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Better11.Services.Network.NetworkService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The PowerShell service used to invoke commands.

member.name: T:Better11.Services.Optimization.OptimizationService
member.summary: Provides system optimization operations via the B11.Optimization PowerShell module. Implements with thread-safe apply and restore operations.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.Optimization.OptimizationService.#ctor(Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPowerShellService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Better11.Services.Optimization.OptimizationService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The PowerShell service used to invoke commands.

member.name: T:Better11.Services.Package.PackageService
member.summary: Provides package management operations via the B11.Packages PowerShell module. Implements with thread-safe install/uninstall/update operations.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.Package.PackageService.#ctor(Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPowerShellService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Better11.Services.Package.PackageService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The PowerShell service used to invoke commands.

member.name: T:Better11.Services.PowerShell.PowerShellService
member.summary: RunspacePool-based PowerShell service. Thread-safe, concurrent, cancellation-aware.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.PowerShell.PowerShellService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Better11.Services.PowerShell.PowerShellService},System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.PowerShell.PowerShellService.ExecuteScriptWithRetryAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes PowerShell script with retry logic for transient failures.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.PowerShell.PowerShellService.IsTransientError(System.Exception)
member.summary: Determines if an exception is transient and worth retrying.

member.name: T:Better11.Services.Privacy.PrivacyService
member.summary: Provides privacy management operations via the B11.Privacy PowerShell module. Implements with thread-safe mutating operations.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.Privacy.PrivacyService.#ctor(Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPowerShellService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Better11.Services.Privacy.PrivacyService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The PowerShell service used to invoke commands.

member.name: T:Better11.Services.ScheduledTask.ScheduledTaskService
member.summary: Provides scheduled task management via the B11.Tasks PowerShell module. Implements with thread-safe mutating operations.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.ScheduledTask.ScheduledTaskService.#ctor(Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPowerShellService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Better11.Services.ScheduledTask.ScheduledTaskService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The PowerShell service used to invoke commands.

member.name: T:Better11.Services.Security.SecurityService
member.summary: Provides security management operations via the B11.Security PowerShell module. Implements with thread-safe mutating operations.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.Security.SecurityService.#ctor(Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPowerShellService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Better11.Services.Security.SecurityService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The PowerShell service used to invoke commands.

member.name: T:Better11.Services.Settings.SettingsService
member.summary: Persists application settings to a JSON file under LocalApplicationData. Implements with thread-safe get/set and lazy file I/O.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.Settings.SettingsService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Better11.Services.Settings.SettingsService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Better11.Services.Startup.StartupService
member.summary: Provides startup item management via the B11.Startup PowerShell module. Implements with thread-safe mutating operations.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.Startup.StartupService.#ctor(Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPowerShellService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Better11.Services.Startup.StartupService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The PowerShell service used to invoke commands.

member.name: T:Better11.Services.SystemInfo.SystemInfoService
member.summary: Provides system information retrieval via the B11.SystemInfo PowerShell module. Implements with short-lived caching for expensive queries.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.SystemInfo.SystemInfoService.#ctor(Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPowerShellService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Better11.Services.SystemInfo.SystemInfoService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The PowerShell service used to invoke commands.

member.name: T:Better11.Services.SystemTray.SystemTrayService
member.summary: Windows Forms-based system tray service implementation for Better11. Provides notification capabilities and context menu integration.

member.name: P:Better11.Services.SystemTray.SystemTrayService.IsVisible
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the system tray is visible.

member.name: P:Better11.Services.SystemTray.SystemTrayService.Tooltip
member.summary: Gets the current tooltip text.

member.name: E:Better11.Services.SystemTray.SystemTrayService.DoubleClicked
member.summary: Event raised when the system tray icon is double-clicked.

member.name: E:Better11.Services.SystemTray.SystemTrayService.RightClicked
member.summary: Event raised when the system tray icon is right-clicked.

member.name: E:Better11.Services.SystemTray.SystemTrayService.Disposed
member.summary: Event raised when the system tray service is disposed.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.SystemTray.SystemTrayService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Better11.Services.SystemTray.SystemTrayService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.SystemTray.SystemTrayService.Dispose
member.summary: Releases all resources used by the SystemTrayService.

member.name: T:Better11.Services.Update.UpdateService
member.summary: Provides Windows Update management operations via the B11.Update PowerShell module. Implements with thread-safe install operations and result caching.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.Update.UpdateService.#ctor(Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPowerShellService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Better11.Services.Update.UpdateService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The PowerShell service used to invoke commands.

member.name: T:Better11.Services.UserAccount.UserAccountService
member.summary: Service for managing user accounts, groups, password policy, and autologin via PowerShell.

member.name: M:Better11.Services.UserAccount.UserAccountService.#ctor(Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPowerShellService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
